name: tree-sitter (Incremental Parser for Code Analysis)

auth.notes: Local library; language grammars installed separately (tree-sitter-python, etc.)

performance.notes: C parser with Python bindings; incremental parsing for large files

agent_readiness.notes: Incremental parser for 100+ programming languages. from tree_sitter import Language, Parser. from tree_sitter_python import language as py_language. PY_LANGUAGE = Language(py_language()). parser = Parser(PY_LANGUAGE). tree = parser.parse(bytes(code, 'utf8')). root = tree.root_node. root.children. node.type, node.text, node.start_point, node.end_point. Query: query = PY_LANGUAGE.query('(function_definition name: (identifier) @func-name)'). captures = query.captures(root). Incremental: parser.parse(new_bytes, old_tree). Error recovery: node.is_error, node.has_error. Used by Neovim, GitHub Copilot, VS Code.

gotchas: Language grammars installed separately: pip install tree-sitter-python, tree-sitter-javascript
API changed significantly in 0.22+ — older examples use deprecated Language.build_library()
S-expression query syntax is unique to tree-sitter (not XPath/CSS)
best_when: Code analysis and transformation across 100+ languages
Building linters, formatters, syntax highlighters, or code navigation tools
Incremental parsing for editor integrations (changes don't reparse entire file)
Extracting function names, class definitions, imports from source code
avoid_when: Simple regex-based code extraction on small files
When AST with full semantic analysis is needed (use ast module for Python, Roslyn for C#)
Custom grammar development without C/Rust experience
summary: tree-sitter parses 100+ programming languages incrementally. Parser(Language(py_language())).parse(code_bytes). root_node.children, node.type, node.text. S-expression queries: '(function_definition name: (identifier) @name)'. Incremental reparsing on edits. Error recovery. MIT by GitHub/Max Brunsfeld. Used in Neovim, Copilot, VS Code. Best for polyglot code analysis and editor tooling. API changed in 0.22+. Language grammars installed separately.
